tasks.subject: Add inbox scaffolding to library template
tasks.verifyCommand: test -f templates/library/inbox/.gitkeep && grep -q 'inbox/' templates/library/.gitignore && echo OK

tasks.subject: Write skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md
tasks.verifyCommand: test -f skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && grep -q 'name: process-inbox' skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Use when' skills/process-inbox/SKILL.md && echo OK

tasks.subject: Version bump to 0.8.0 and CHANGELOG entry
tasks.verifyCommand: jq -r .version .claude-plugin/plugin.json | grep -q '0.8.0' && jq -r '.plugins[0].version' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json | grep -q '0.8.0' && echo OK
